case_title: C & C OF SAN FRANCISCO/OFC OF TREAS.&TAX COLLECTOR et al VS CHAVEZ, ISMAEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-02-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
